title: Multiplayer Wonderland
description: THIS MODPACK IS BEST EXPERIENCED WITH FRIENDS! Survive with other players in a world with harder mobs and scarcer resources!
body:
# A Harder and Smoother Survival Experience
This pack upgrades vanilla with a mix of difficulty tweaks and performance improvements. It also adds a soft, dreamlike layer of atmosphere inspired by a gentle wonderland style without changing core gameplay.

### WHEN CREATING A SERVER, **REMOVE TRUE DARKNESS FROM SERVER** AND KEEP IT ON CLIENT, OTHER SERVER WILL CRASH!

## Tougher Survival
- Smarter enemies
- Harsher environments
- More pressure on resources
- A survival loop that stays engaging

## Performance That Feels Better
The pack uses a tuned Forge setup with modern optimizations, memory friendly tweaks, and faster loading. From my own testing, it runs smoother than the Fabric builds I have tried, even with the added difficulty and visual style. (i play on integrated graphics and my fps is SMOOTH!)

## Why Use This Pack
- A unique wonderland inspired atmosphere
- Balanced difficulty that feels fair
- Performance that, in my experience, competes with or surpasses Fabric
- A cohesive setup for long term survival worlds
